features: Double Layer Waterproof: Ymapinc pink shower caps for women feature a double-layer design with a terry cloth lining and an EVA exterior. This waterproof spotty shower cap ensures your hair stays dry and frizz-free, making it suitable for daily use and various hair care routines

Comfortable & Secure Fit: Our pink shower caps for women come with a well-sewn elastic band that holds thick hair firmly without causing discomfort. The soft elastic band of this waterproof shower cap ensures a snug fit without irritating your head or neck, providing a comfortable experience every time

Adjustable Size: This pink shower cap measures 28x28x1 cm, suitable for most hair styles, the adjustable design allows for a customized wearing style, please carefully check your head circumference before purchasing to ensure it fits your head shape

Multi-purpose Use: Ymapinc waterproof shower cap is versatile and suitable for various activities such as showering, facial cleaning, hair treatments, cooking, and home cleaning. These shower caps for women are also convenient for travel and hotel stays, making them a practical addition to your personal care routine

Durable & Reusable: Made from EVA and polyester materials, our pink shower caps bath hat are durable and eco-friendly. They are machine washable and designed for long-term use, providing a cost-effective and sustainable choice for maintaining your hair's health and style
description: Product description Product name: Pink Shower cap Color: Pink Material: EVA + Polyester Product size (cm): 28*28*1cm Product size (inch): 11*11*0.39inch Net weight: 49.1g Packing method: Bag packing Packing list: 1pcs pink shower cap Directions 1. Ensure hair is dry or damp before putting on the shower cap. 2. Secure the shower cap tightly around the hairline to prevent water seepage. 3. Avoid submerging the entire shower cap in water, as it is designed to keep the hair dry during showering or bathing, not for complete water immersion.
